wind_info.description: 9 o-clock crosswind from left for Hole 1

bh.shot_strategy: With a 9 o-clock crosswind from left, your RHBH flight plate is exposed to the wind — throw a controlled RHFH with an overstable disc to fight the leftward push on this 392ft par 3. Watch for Roadway to the right and past the basket.

fh.shot_strategy: For this 9 o-clock crosswind from left, RHFH is the safer choice as it keeps the flight plate protected — use an overstable disc and aim slightly right of your target to account for the wind pushing left on Hole 1. Watch for Roadway to the right and past the basket.

bh.shot_strategy: With a 9 o-clock crosswind from left, your LHBH natural fade works with the wind direction — use a stable to overstable disc and aim slightly left of your target on this 392ft par 3. Watch for Roadway to the right and past the basket.

fh.shot_strategy: For this 9 o-clock crosswind from left, LHFH is also viable — use an overstable disc and focus on a clean release to minimize the wind effect on Hole 1. Watch for Roadway to the right and past the basket.

bh.shot_strategy: With a 6 o-clock tailwind, you'll get extra distance — use an understable to stable disc and throw with normal power, allowing the tailwind to carry your shot on this 179ft par 3. Avoid the Any lie not inside the island is given a One stroke penalty to prevent penalty strokes.

wind_info.description: 9 o'clock crosswind from right for Hole 8

bh.shot_strategy: With 9 o'clock crosswind from right on Hole 8, your RHBH flight plate is exposed — throw an overstable driver on a hyzer line to minimize leftward drift.

fh.shot_strategy: The 9 o'clock crosswind from right on Hole 8 favors RHFH — use an overstable fairway driver with a flat release to fight the wind.

bh.shot_strategy: The 9 o'clock crosswind from right on Hole 8 works with LHBH natural fade — use a stable driver to let the wind assist your rightward finish.

fh.shot_strategy: For LHFH on Hole 8's 9 o'clock crosswind from right, choose an overstable fairway driver with hyzer to counter the leftward push.

bh.shot_strategy: Facing 11 o'clock headwind on Hole 10 [A] (A basket), throw an overstable distance driver on RHBH with extra height to combat the headwind.

bh.shot_strategy: With 11 o'clock headwind on Hole 10 [A] (A basket), disc up to an overstable driver on LHBH to maintain distance through the headwind.

fh.shot_strategy: The 11 o'clock headwind on Hole 10 [A] (A basket) demands extra stability — use a very overstable driver on LHFH to power through the wind.

fh.shot_strategy: The 2 o'clock crosswind from left on Hole 13 [A] (A basket) exposes your RHFH flight plate — use an overstable fairway driver to minimize rightward drift.

bh.shot_strategy: Facing 2 o'clock crosswind from left on Hole 13 [A] (A basket), your LHBH faces double trouble — use a very overstable driver with extra hyzer to fight the rightward push.

fh.shot_strategy: The 2 o'clock crosswind from left on Hole 13 [A] (A basket) is favorable for LHFH — throw an understable fairway driver to work with the rightward wind.
